personas.name: L&D Leader
personas.profile: Owns leadership development and wants to understand whether The Mindshift can help managers lead through AI-driven change.
constraints: Needs an enterprise-relevant path and clear next step

personas.name: Founder CEO
personas.profile: Runs a growing company and wants practical help turning AI disruption into strategic advantage.
goals: Identify a path to start a conversation
constraints: Will leave if the page feels abstract or consultant-generic

tasks.title: Understand the offer
tasks.description: Use the site to understand what The Mindshift offers and who it is for.
successCriteria: The site communicates a clear audience, outcome, and next step

tasks.title: Find a relationship path
tasks.description: Find the most obvious next step to subscribe, contact, book, or otherwise start a relationship.
successCriteria: A safe next step is visible without submitting a form
